betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Undefined§f

§aThe mysterious byproduct of digamma fuel recycling — unlocks the murky anvil and digamma laser crystal!§f

§bUndefined§f is a mysterious substance obtained by recycling §bDigamma RBMK Fuel Rods§f in a §bSILEX§f. It is a dark, undefined material with strange properties.

§6Production§f:
Burn Digamma RBMK Fuel Rods in an RBMK, then process the spent fuel in a SILEX to extract Undefined.

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bMurky Anvil§f — a unique anvil type with special properties
§b• §bDigamma Laser Crystal§f — required for digamma-based laser equipment
§b• §bRod of Discord§f — the ultimate teleportation item (requires Book of Boxcars)

§eTip§f: Undefined is the final product of the digamma fuel cycle. It is entirely optional — skip the entire digamma branch if you're not interested in the Rod of Discord or murky anvil. The SILEX process is slow, so plan for multiple fuel rods if you need significant amounts of Undefined.
